title: Flow Cytometry Protocol for LAMP1 Staining
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bdpop","text":"This protocol outlines a detailed procedure for flow cytometry-based staining of lysosome-associated membrane protein 1 (LAMP1) in human cells. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fu9g4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6kiaq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"26il9","text":"Trypsin","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2c8f7","text":"3% Formaldehyde in PBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fu3p0","text":"90% Ice-cold methanol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"chfaa","text":"3% BSA in PBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5kc4","text":"LAMP1 antibody (Rabbit anti-human LAMP1, Cell Signaling Technology, Cat. No. 9091S)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4nkfg","text":"Alexa Fluor-647 secondary antibody","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6bea4","text":"Wash buffer: PBS + 1% BSA + 0.05% Tween-20","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dgepr","text":"Flow cytometer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a2irc","text":"Centrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Lift adherent cells by adding trypsin to the culture plate.
Resuspend the cell pellet in 1 mL 90% ice-cold methanol while vortexing at low speed to prevent clump formation.
After the incubation, centrifuge the cells at 1000 x g, 4 °C, 3 minutes and discard the supernatant.
Resuspend the cells in 1 mL of 3% BSA (in PBS).
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 to block non-specific binding sites.
Centrifuge the cells at 1000 x g, °C, 3 minutes and discard the supernatant.
Resuspend the cells in 3% BSA in PBS containing a 1:1000 dilution of Alexa Fluor-647 (or any fluorescently labeled secondary antibody compatible with the flow cytometer).
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 to 01:00:00
Wash the cells twice with wash buffer to remove unbound secondary antibody. Centrifuge the cells at 1000 x g, °C, 3 minutes and discard the supernatant.
Once cells are detached, centrifuge the cells at ~ 1000 x g, °C, 3 minutes to pellet them.
Wash cell pellet with 1 mL 1XPBS. 1000 x g, 4 °C, 3 minutes and and discard the supernatant.
Resuspend the cell pellet in 1 mL of 3% formaldehyde.
Incubate the cells at 3 37 °C for 00:10:00 to fix cells.
Centrifuge the cells at 1000 x g, °C, for 00:03:00 and discard the supernatant.
Resuspend the cells in 3% BSA in PBS containing a 300 µL 1:1000 dilution of Rabbit anti-human LAMP1 antibody (Cat. No. 9091).
Centrifuge the cells at 1000 x g, °C, 3 minutes and discard the supernatant.
Incubate at 37 °C , for 01:00:00 to 02:00:00 with intermittent low-speed vortexing to keep the cells in suspension.
Resuspend the cells in wash buffer (PBS + 1% BSA + 0.05% Tween-20) and centrifuge at 1000 x g, °C, 3 minutes and discard the supernatant.
Repeat the wash step once more to remove excess primary antibody. 1000 x g, °C, 3 minutes and discard the supernatant.
Resuspend the cells in an appropriate volume of wash buffer (Usually 500 µL for flow cytometry analysis.
Measure the intensity of LAMP1 expression using a flow cytometer, detecting the Alexa Fluor-647 signal (or equivalent secondary antibody fluorophore).
creator: Ali Ghoochani
